email.subject: Emergency plumbing service - major leak under sink
email.body:
Hi,

I’m dealing with a serious leak under my kitchen sink. Water has been dripping steadily for the past hour and it’s starting to soak into the cabinet wood.

I’m worried it may cause damage if it isn’t fixed quickly. Do you have someone available to come out today?

Thank you,
Lucas Hoffman

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for drain cleaning service
email.body:
Hello,

I wanted to ask about your pricing for a bathroom sink drain cleaning. The sink has been draining very slowly and I suspect there is a clog.

Could you let me know the typical cost range and whether there is a call-out fee?

Best regards,
Emily Jones

email.subject: Request to schedule a plumbing inspection next week
email.body:
Hi,

I’d like to schedule a general plumbing inspection for our apartment. We recently moved in and want to ensure everything is in good condition.

Are you available Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon next week?

Thanks,
Michael Chen

email.subject: Emergency - toilet overflowing urgently
email.body:
Hi,

Our toilet has started overflowing and we cannot get the water to stop rising. We tried shutting off the valve but it doesn’t seem to work.

This is quite urgent. Can someone come as soon as possible today?

Thank you,
Sarah Mitchell

email.subject: do you offer weekend appointments?
email.body:
Hello,

I work during the week and wanted to know if your company provides plumbing appointments on weekends.

If so, is there an additional fee for Saturday or Sunday service?

Thanks,
David Wilson

email.subject: Pricing question for emergency after-hours service
email.body:
Hi,

I’d like to understand your pricing for emergency plumbing services outside normal business hours.

If something happens late at night, do you provide after-hours visits, and what does it typically cost?

Kind regards,
Olivia Brown

email.subject: Scheduling request for annual home plumbing check
email.body:
Hello,

I’m interested in booking an annual plumbing inspection for my house. Everything seems fine, but I want to make sure there are no hidden leaks.

Do you have availability early next month?

Thanks,
James Roberts

email.subject: do you install new water heaters?
email.body:
Hi,

I’m considering replacing my old water heater since it’s over 10 years old.

Do you offer installation services, and do you help recommend the right model for a household?

Best,
Anna Keller

email.subject: Emergency - no hot water since this morning
email.body:
Hi,

We suddenly lost hot water this morning. The heater seems to be running, but only cold water comes from all taps.

Can someone come today to take a look? We have children at home so it’s urgent.

Thank you,
Daniel Moore

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for fixing a leaking shower faucet
email.body:
Hello,

My shower faucet has been leaking constantly for a few days. It’s not flooding, but it’s wasting water.

Could you give me an estimate of the cost to repair or replace the valve?

Thanks,
Chloe Anderson

email.subject: Scheduling request for pipe replacement consultation
email.body:
Hi,

We have an older home and are concerned some of the pipes may need replacement.

Could we schedule a consultation sometime next week to discuss options and pricing?

Regards,
Ethan Parker

email.subject: Emergency - burst pipe in basement
email.body:
Hi,

We have a burst pipe in the basement and water is spreading quickly across the floor.

We turned off the main valve but need professional help immediately. Are you able to send someone right away?

Thank you,
Mia Thompson

email.subject: do you provide free estimates?
email.body:
Hello,

Before booking, I wanted to ask if you provide free estimates for plumbing repairs.

Do you charge for an initial visit or consultation?

Thanks,
Noah Green

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for installing a new toilet
email.body:
Hi,

I’m planning to replace an old toilet in my home.

Could you tell me what the typical installation cost would be, and whether disposal of the old unit is included?

Best,
Isabella Martin

email.subject: Scheduling request for kitchen faucet installation
email.body:
Hello,

I recently bought a new kitchen faucet and would like professional installation.

Do you have availability this Friday or early next week?

Thank you,
Liam Scott

email.subject: Emergency - sewer smell coming from drains
email.body:
Hi,

We noticed a strong sewer smell coming from our bathroom drains. It started yesterday and is getting worse.

Could this indicate a serious issue? Can someone come out soon to inspect?

Thanks,
Sophia Hall

email.subject: do you service commercial buildings?
email.body:
Hello,

I manage a small office building and wanted to know if your plumbing services also cover commercial properties.

Please let me know.

Best regards,
Jackson Adams

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for water softener installation
email.body:
Hi,

We are considering installing a water softener system due to hard water issues.

Could you share pricing information and whether you provide installation?

Thank you,
Amelia Baker

email.subject: Scheduling request for drain inspection with camera
email.body:
Hi,

I’ve heard about camera inspections for drains and pipes.

Do you offer this service, and can I schedule an appointment next week?

Regards,
Henry Evans

email.subject: Emergency - water heater leaking
email.body:
Hi,

Our water heater appears to be leaking from the bottom and water is pooling around it.

I’m concerned it may fail completely. Can someone come today?

Thank you,
Grace Turner

email.subject: what areas do you service?
email.body:
Hello,

Before booking, I wanted to confirm what service areas you cover.

Do you provide plumbing services outside the city center?

Thanks,
Leo Phillips

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for unclogging main sewer line
email.body:
Hi,

We suspect our main sewer line may be clogged because multiple drains are backing up.

Could you provide a general cost estimate for clearing a main line blockage?

Best,
Victoria Campbell

email.subject: Scheduling request for bathroom renovation plumbing work
email.body:
Hello,

We are planning a bathroom renovation and will need plumbing adjustments.

Could we schedule a visit to discuss the project and timeline?

Thank you,
Samuel Morris

email.subject: Emergency - dishwasher water backing up into sink
email.body:
Hi,

Whenever we run the dishwasher, dirty water backs up into the kitchen sink.

This seems urgent as we can’t use the sink properly. Can someone come soon?

Thanks,
Lily Rogers

email.subject: do you offer maintenance plans?
email.body:
Hello,

Do you provide any ongoing maintenance plans for homeowners, such as annual inspections or discounted services?

I’d love to learn more.

Regards,
Owen Reed

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for fixing low water pressure
email.body:
Hi,

We’ve been experiencing low water pressure in our shower and kitchen faucet.

Could you let me know what the cost might be to diagnose and fix this issue?

Thank you,
Zoe Cook

email.subject: Scheduling request for replacing outdoor spigot
email.body:
Hi,

Our outdoor spigot is leaking and needs replacement.

Do you have availability this week for a quick repair?

Thanks,
Carter Bailey

email.subject: Emergency - frozen pipes concern
email.body:
Hi,

With the cold weather, we are worried our pipes may have frozen. Some faucets have stopped running completely.

Can someone come urgently to check before pipes burst?

Thank you,
Hannah Bell

email.subject: do you provide same-day service?
email.body:
Hello,

I wanted to ask if you provide same-day plumbing service for urgent but non-emergency issues.

Please let me know your typical response time.

Best,
Sebastian Kim

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for garbage disposal repair
email.body:
Hi,

Our garbage disposal stopped working and makes a humming noise.

Could you share an estimate for repair or replacement?

Thank you,
Nora Hughes

email.subject: Scheduling request for installing a new bathtub faucet
email.body:
Hi,

I purchased a new bathtub faucet set and would like it installed professionally.

Are you available early next week?

Regards,
Wyatt Foster

email.subject: Emergency - water backing up in shower drain
email.body:
Hi,

Whenever we flush the toilet, water backs up into the shower drain.

I believe this could be a serious blockage. Can you send someone as soon as possible?

Thank you,
Ella Gray

email.subject: FAQ - do you guarantee your repair work?
email.body:
Hello,

Before hiring a plumber, I wanted to ask whether you provide any warranty or guarantee on repair work.

Thanks,
Gabriel Price

email.subject: Inquiry for installing a new shower system
email.body:
Hi,

We are considering upgrading to a new shower system with multiple heads.

Could you give an idea of installation pricing?

Best,
Scarlett Long

email.subject: Scheduling request for fixing running toilet
email.body:
Hi,

One of our toilets runs constantly after flushing.

Could I schedule an appointment sometime this week to repair it?

Thank you,
Julian Patterson

email.subject: Emergency - gas smell near water heater
email.body:
Hi,

We noticed a gas-like smell near our water heater area.

This feels urgent and potentially dangerous. Can someone come immediately or advise what we should do?

Thank you,
Penelope Ward

email.subject: do you handle insurance-related repairs?
email.body:
Hello,

If plumbing damage is covered by home insurance, do you provide documentation or invoices needed for claims?

Thanks,
Dylan Brooks

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for repiping an older home
email.body:
Hi,

We live in an older house and are considering repiping due to frequent leaks.

Could you provide general pricing guidance for a full repipe project?

Regards,
Layla Bennett

email.subject: Scheduling request for emergency preparedness inspection
email.body:
Hi,

We want to ensure our plumbing system is ready for winter.

Could we schedule an inspection appointment sometime in the next two weeks?

Thanks,
Isaac Henderson

email.subject: Emergency - washing machine drain overflowing
email.body:
Hi,

When we run the washing machine, water overflows from the drain pipe.

We need help urgently to prevent flooding. Are you available today?

Thank you,
Madison Cole

email.subject: do you provide eco-friendly plumbing solutions?
email.body:
Hello,

Do you offer eco-friendly plumbing upgrades such as water-saving fixtures?

I’m interested in reducing water usage at home.

Best,
Asher Ramirez

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for fixing a cracked pipe
email.body:
Hi,

We discovered a small crack in a visible pipe in our utility room.

Could you provide an estimate for repair before it becomes a bigger issue?

Thank you,
Aubrey James

email.subject: Scheduling request for installing bidet attachment
email.body:
Hello,

I recently purchased a bidet attachment and would like help installing it properly.

Can I book an appointment next week?

Thanks,
Logan Morgan

email.subject: Emergency - flooded bathroom floor
email.body:
Hi,

Our bathroom floor is flooded due to a pipe leak behind the toilet.

We need urgent assistance before water spreads further. Please let me know if you can come today.

Thank you,
Stella Howard

email.subject: what payment methods do you accept?
email.body:
Hello,

Do you accept credit cards or online payments, or only cash/check?

Thanks,
Colton Wright

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for installing under-sink filter
email.body:
Hi,

I’m interested in installing an under-sink water filtration system.

Could you provide a pricing estimate for installation service?

Best,
Paisley Flores

email.subject: Scheduling request for replacing shower drain
email.body:
Hi,

Our shower drain cover is damaged and may need replacement.

Can we schedule a repair appointment sometime this week?

Thanks,
Jace Simmons

email.subject: Emergency - no water pressure in entire house
email.body:
Hi,

We suddenly lost water pressure throughout the entire house.

Nothing is coming from faucets. This seems urgent. Can you assist today?

Thank you,
Everly Pierce

email.subject: Do you offer senior discounts?
email.body:
Hello,

Do you provide any discounts for seniors or repeat customers?

Thank you,
Xavier Hayes

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for repairing a running faucet
email.body:
Hi,

Our kitchen faucet keeps running even when turned off fully.

Could you share an estimate for repairing this issue?

Best,
Leah Fisher

email.subject: Scheduling request for pipe insulation service
email.body:
Hi,

I want to insulate exposed pipes in the basement before winter.

Do you offer this service and can I schedule a visit soon?

Thanks,
Jeremiah Hudson

email.subject: Emergency - sump pump stopped working
email.body:
Hi,

Our sump pump has stopped working and water is starting to collect in the basement.

This is urgent. Can someone come out as soon as possible?

Thank you,
Violet Kennedy

email.subject: FAQ - do you provide 24/7 emergency support?
email.body:
Hello,

Do you offer 24/7 emergency plumbing services, including holidays?

I’d like to know in case of future emergencies.

Best,
Kingston Owens

email.subject: Pricing inquiry for fixing cracked toilet tank
email.body:
Hi,

We noticed a crack forming in the toilet tank and are concerned it may leak.

Could you provide pricing guidance for repair or replacement?

Thank you,
Hazel Reynolds

email.subject: Scheduling request for installing new sink
email.body:
Hello,

We are remodeling our kitchen and purchased a new sink.

Could we schedule installation sometime next week?

Regards,
Ryan Palmer

email.subject: Question about invoice and card payment options
email.body:
Hello,

I received an invoice for the recent faucet repair and wanted to confirm which payment methods you accept.

Can I pay by credit card online, or do you only accept bank transfer?

Thank you,
Clara Webb

email.subject: Billing question about deposit and final payment
email.body:
Hi,

Before confirming the repiping work, I wanted to ask how your billing works.

Do you require a deposit up front, and when is the remaining balance due?

Best regards,
Mason Powell

email.subject: Please cancel my appointment for Friday
email.body:
Hi,

Something has come up and I will not be able to make the plumbing appointment we scheduled for Friday morning.

Please cancel it completely.

Thank you,
Zoey Russell

email.subject: No longer need the scheduled inspection
email.body:
Hello,

I no longer need the inspection appointment that was booked for next week.

Please go ahead and cancel the booking.

Thanks,
Caleb Ford

email.subject: Can we reschedule my appointment to a later time?
email.body:
Hi,

I have a plumbing appointment booked for Tuesday afternoon, but that time no longer works for me.

Could we move it to Wednesday morning instead?

Thank you,
Natalie Stone

email.subject: Need to change existing booking
email.body:
Hello,

The current appointment slot for the water heater inspection is too early for us.

Would it be possible to change the booking to a later time this week?

Best,
Aaron Bishop

email.subject: What time are you open on weekdays?
email.body:
Hello,

Before I book anything, I wanted to know your business hours during the week.

What time do you open and close from Monday to Friday?

Thanks,
Ruby Hunt

email.subject: Are you open on public holidays?
email.body:
Hi,

Do you work on public holidays or are you closed on those days?

I am trying to plan ahead and wanted to confirm your availability.

Regards,
Cooper Graham

email.subject: Need help repairing cracked outdoor pipe
email.body:
Hi,

A visible outdoor pipe near our garden tap has cracked and is leaking steadily.

We need professional help to repair it before the damage spreads.

Thank you,
Bella Ross

email.subject: Service needed for leaking boiler connection
email.body:
Hello,

There is water dripping from the connection under our boiler, and we would like a technician to fix the issue.

Please let me know if you can help with this repair.

Thanks,
Hudson Perry

email.subject: Very unhappy with the recent repair work
email.body:
Hello,

I am very disappointed with the service from your technician last week.

The leak started again the day after the repair, and the overall experience was poor.

I would like someone to address this issue.

Regards,
Savannah Price

email.subject: Complaint about poor quality service
email.body:
Hi,

I need to complain about the plumbing work completed at my house yesterday.

The technician left without fixing the problem properly, and I am frustrated with the bad service.

Thank you,
Roman Sanders

email.subject: Great service from your plumber
email.body:
Hello,

I just wanted to say thank you for the excellent service yesterday.

Your plumber was professional, friendly, and fixed the issue quickly.

Best regards,
Luna Barnes

email.subject: Positive feedback on today's appointment
email.body:
Hi,

I was really happy with the repair visit this morning.

Everything was explained clearly, and the work was completed neatly. Please pass on my thanks to the technician.

Thanks,
Eli Gibson

email.subject: Warranty claim for recent water heater repair
email.body:
Hello,

You repaired our water heater about three weeks ago, but the same fault has returned.

Since the repair should still be under warranty, I would like to make a warranty claim and have it checked again.

Regards,
Hazel Warren

email.subject: Guarantee issue with previous pipe repair
email.body:
Hi,

The pipe joint your team repaired last month has started leaking again.

I believe this should be covered under your guarantee, so please advise on the next step for the warranty claim.

Thank you,
Declan Hamilton

email.subject: Request to replace faulty faucet you installed
email.body:
Hello,

The faucet your team installed recently is already malfunctioning and keeps dripping even when turned off.

Could you arrange a replacement unit instead of another repair?

Best,
Aurora Mitchell

email.subject: Need replacement for failed shower valve
email.body:
Hi,

The replacement shower valve fitted during the last visit has failed again.

I would like to request a full replacement rather than another temporary fix.

Thanks,
Micah Coleman

email.subject: Requesting refund for unresolved repair
email.body:
Hello,

I paid for a drain repair last week, but the problem was never resolved.

I would like a refund for the service because the issue remains exactly the same.

Regards,
Aria Reed

email.subject: Can I get my money back for the cancelled job?
email.body:
Hi,

Your team was unable to complete the scheduled work, but I was still charged a deposit.

Please let me know how I can get the money back.

Thank you,
Carson Fleming

email.subject: Interested in upgrading to a better water filtration system
email.body:
Hello,

We currently have a basic filtration unit installed, but we are thinking about upgrading to a more advanced system.

Could you explain the upgrade options and the differences between packages?

Best regards,
Serenity Walsh

email.subject: Can we upgrade our existing maintenance plan?
email.body:
Hi,

We already use your annual plumbing maintenance service and wanted to ask if there is a higher-tier package available.

I am interested in upgrading if it includes priority support and more inspections.

Thanks,
Jason Bradley

email.subject: Bulk service inquiry for apartment complex
email.body:
Hello,

I manage a 24-unit apartment complex and need a plumbing company that can handle routine maintenance across multiple units.

Could you provide information about bulk service pricing or a corporate maintenance arrangement?

Regards,
Megan Foster

email.subject: Corporate inquiry for servicing several buildings
email.body:
Hi,

Our company oversees plumbing maintenance for several office buildings in the area.

We would like to discuss a bulk service agreement covering regular inspections and on-call support.

Thank you,
Daniel Cross

email.subject: Following up after our phone call
email.body:
Hello,

Thank you for speaking with me earlier.

I just wanted to confirm that I received your message and will review everything this evening.

Best,
Ivy Murphy

email.subject: Just checking in
email.body:
Hi,

I am writing to follow up on our previous conversation and to say I appreciate the update.

No action is needed from your side right now.

Thanks,
Theo Carter

email.subject: Just checking in
email.body:
Hi,

Sorry, could you please cancel this appointment? Because I have booked the appointment with another company.

Thanks.

email.subject: Scheduling request for annual home plumbing check
email.body:
Hi,

could you please change the appointment time?

Tomorrow 11:00 is better for me.

Thanks.

email.subject: Request to schedule a plumbing inspection next month
email.body:
Hi,

Sorry, I'm busy on that appointment date. Therefore, could you please cancel this appointment?

Thanks.

email.subject: Scheduling request for annual home plumbing check
email.body:
Hi,

I have to work on April 21. So, could you please cancel this appointment?

Thank you very much.

email.subject: Need urgent appointment - burst pipe in bathroom
email.body:
Hi,

Sorry, I have to cancel this appointment as I have made an appointment with another company.

Thanks.

email.subject: Rescheduling request
email.body:
Hi,

Sorry, I will be on holiday on the appointment date. Can I reschedule this appointment?.

Thanks.

email.subject: Move appointment to next Monday
email.body:
Hi,

That day is not OK for me. Could you move this appoinment to next Monday morning?

Thanks.

email.subject: Booking a plumber for a dripping tap this Thursday
email.body:
Hi,

I have a dripping tap in the kitchen that has been getting worse over the past week.

Could I book a plumber to come out this Thursday afternoon?

Many thanks,
Tom Harrison

email.subject: Schedule a consultation for bathroom renovation
email.body:
Hello,

We are planning a full bathroom renovation and would like a plumber to consult on the pipe layout.

Could we arrange a visit sometime next week at your earliest convenience?

Best regards,
Claire Newton

email.subject: Appointment needed for blocked outside drain
email.body:
Hi,

Our outside drain is completely blocked and water is pooling in the garden whenever it rains.

Could I book someone to come and clear it this week?

Thanks,
Patrick Walsh

email.subject: Book a visit to fix toilet cistern not filling
email.body:
Hello,

The cistern on our upstairs toilet is not refilling after flushing. It has been like this for two days.

Can I schedule a repair appointment for later this week?

Kind regards,
Diana Foster

email.subject: Schedule visit for annual boiler service
email.body:
Hi,

Our boiler is due for its annual service and I would like to book this in as soon as possible.

Do you have any slots available next Monday or Tuesday?

Thank you,
Neil Graham

email.subject: Request to arrange plumber for new radiator valve fitting
email.body:
Hello,

Several radiator valves in our house need replacing as they are old and stiff.

Could we schedule a morning appointment next week for the work?

Best,
Janet Cooper

email.subject: Scheduling request for water softener installation
email.body:
Hi,

I have purchased a water softener and need a qualified plumber to install it properly.

Are you available this Friday or the following Monday?

Regards,
Victor Price

email.subject: Can we book a plumber for Monday to check water pressure?
email.body:
Hi,

The water pressure in our house has dropped noticeably over the past week.

Could someone come on Monday morning to investigate?

Thank you,
Sandra Norris

email.subject: How much does it cost to fit a new bathroom suite?
email.body:
Hello,

We are looking to have a full new bathroom suite fitted including bath, toilet, and basin.

Could you provide a ballpark cost for labour and installation?

Best regards,
Ben Hartley

email.subject: Quote for replacing all radiators in a three-bed house
email.body:
Hi,

We have seven radiators in our home that are very old and would like to replace all of them.

Could you provide a quote or a cost range for this work?

Thank you,
Fiona Nash

email.subject: What is the price for a CCTV drain survey?
email.body:
Hi,

We have had recurring drain blockages and a neighbour suggested a CCTV drain survey.

Could you tell me how much this service typically costs?

Kind regards,
Derek James

email.subject: Cost for dishwasher plumbing installation
email.body:
Hello,

I have bought a new dishwasher and need the kitchen plumbing adjusted for connection.

What would you typically charge for this type of work?

Best,
Melissa Hunt

email.subject: Pricing for fixing a noisy boiler
email.body:
Hi,

Our boiler has been making loud banging and gurgling sounds.

Could you give me an estimate for diagnosing and resolving the noise issue?

Thanks,
Stuart Mason

email.subject: How much to fix a blocked outdoor drain?
email.body:
Hello,

Our outdoor gully drain is blocked and flooding the path.

Could you let me know the approximate cost to clear and inspect it?

Regards,
Wendy Cox

email.subject: Price inquiry for fixing a burst pipe in the loft
email.body:
Hi,

We have a burst pipe in the loft space that is causing damage to the ceiling below.

Could you provide a rough cost estimate for the repair?

Thank you,
Alan Shaw

email.subject: What is your emergency call-out charge at night?
email.body:
Hello,

I wanted to find out what your emergency call-out fee is for late-night or weekend plumbing issues.

Is there a fixed rate or does it vary?

Best regards,
Caroline Weir

email.subject: Do you offer a referral discount?
email.body:
Hello,

I recommended your service to a friend who has already booked with you.

Do you offer any referral discount or credit for existing customers who refer new ones?

Best,
Peter Banks

email.subject: How long does a typical bathroom installation take?
email.body:
Hi,

We are planning a bathroom renovation and wanted to understand the timescale.

How many days does a full bathroom installation usually take?

Thank you,
Helen Ford

email.subject: Do you provide written quotes before starting work?
email.body:
Hello,

Before agreeing to any work, I would like to receive a written quote.

Is it standard practice for you to provide a detailed written estimate first?

Kind regards,
Matt Day

email.subject: Is there a minimum charge for a call-out?
email.body:
Hi,

I have a small plumbing issue and wanted to know if there is a minimum charge for a call-out visit.

Does the charge change depending on the time of day?

Thanks,
Alice Cross

email.subject: Do you keep spare parts in the van to avoid return visits?
email.body:
Hello,

I've had issues with other plumbers needing to come back twice because they didn't have the part.

Do your engineers carry common spare parts with them?

Best regards,
Frank Hunt

email.subject: Do you work with letting agents and landlords?
email.body:
Hi,

I am a private landlord and need a reliable plumber for my rental properties.

Do you work with landlords or letting agents and offer any kind of regular arrangement?

Thank you,
Grace Leigh

email.subject: Do you offer flexible payment plans?
email.body:
Hello,

I need some significant plumbing work done but may not be able to pay in full upfront.

Do you offer any form of flexible or deferred payment arrangement?

Best,
Ian Butler

email.subject: Do you carry out work for housing associations?
email.body:
Hi,

I work for a small housing association and am looking for a reliable plumbing contractor.

Do you take on work for housing associations or social landlords?

Thanks,
Kate Dixon

email.subject: Please cancel my appointment for Tuesday
email.body:
Hi,

Something has come up at work and I will not be able to make Tuesday's appointment.

Could you please cancel it? I may rebook at a later date.

Sorry for any inconvenience,
Gary Knight

email.subject: Need to cancel - going on holiday
email.body:
Hello,

I completely forgot I am going away on the same day as my appointment.

Please cancel the booking. I will get back in touch when I return.

Thank you,
Rachel Bond

email.subject: Cancel drain inspection - house has been sold
email.body:
Hi,

We have sold the property and so no longer need the drain inspection that was scheduled.

Please cancel the appointment entirely.

Best regards,
Mike Summers

email.subject: Cancel appointment - I fixed it myself
email.body:
Hi,

The issue turned out to be a simple blockage that I managed to clear myself.

Please cancel the booked appointment as it is no longer needed.

Thanks,
Lucy Mann

email.subject: Cancel the service call - moved to a different provider
email.body:
Hello,

I have decided to go with a different company for this repair.

Could you please cancel the appointment we had scheduled for next week?

Thank you,
Joe Byrne

email.subject: Cancel booking - can't afford the repair this month
email.body:
Hi,

Unfortunately I am unable to proceed with the work at this time due to financial reasons.

Please cancel my appointment and I will get back to you when I am ready to proceed.

Kind regards,
Paula Holt

email.subject: Cancel tomorrow's visit - family emergency
email.body:
Hi,

I have had a family emergency and I am unable to be home tomorrow.

Please cancel the appointment for now. I will call to reschedule when things settle down.

Sorry for the last-minute notice,
Dave McLean

email.subject: Cancel my plumbing appointment - tenant not cooperating
email.body:
Hello,

My tenant is refusing access to the property for the scheduled visit.

I will need to cancel the appointment for now until I can arrange access.

Thank you,
Tina Burns

email.subject: Can we move Thursday's appointment to Friday afternoon?
email.body:
Hi,

I have a work commitment that has come up on Thursday so I won't be able to make the appointment.

Could we move it to Friday afternoon instead?

Thank you,
Mark Oliver

email.subject: Need to push the inspection back by one week
email.body:
Hello,

Due to a family matter, I need to delay the boiler inspection.

Could we reschedule to the same time but one week later?

Best regards,
Donna White

email.subject: Can you reschedule my slot to a morning time?
email.body:
Hi,

The afternoon slot no longer works for me as I have school pick-up.

Is it possible to change the appointment to a morning time instead?

Thanks,
Charlie West

email.subject: Move my booking to the following week please
email.body:
Hello,

The current week no longer works for me and I need to push the appointment out.

Could you move it to the same day and time the following week?

Kind regards,
Amy Rice

email.subject: Something came up - can we do it the day after?
email.body:
Hi,

I have an unexpected meeting on the day of my appointment.

Would it be possible to shift it to the following day at the same time?

Thanks,
Rob Blake

email.subject: I forgot about a doctor's appointment - need to reschedule
email.body:
Hello,

I just realised I have a doctor's appointment at the same time as my plumbing booking.

Could we reschedule to a different day this week?

Apologies for the inconvenience,
Kerry Fox

email.subject: Reschedule visit - building work is being done that day
email.body:
Hi,

We are having other building work done on the day of our appointment and it would cause too much disruption.

Could we move the plumbing visit to a day next week instead?

Thanks,
Ben Cox

email.subject: Can we shift the appointment to Saturday?
email.body:
Hello,

I am unable to take time off work during the week.

Would it be possible to reschedule my appointment to Saturday?

Best regards,
Sue Hart

email.subject: What are your Saturday opening hours?
email.body:
Hi,

I work during the week and would prefer a Saturday appointment.

Could you tell me what hours you are available on Saturdays?

Thank you,
Jim Taylor

email.subject: Are you available on bank holidays?
email.body:
Hello,

I am trying to plan ahead for an upcoming bank holiday weekend.

Do you provide services on bank holidays and is there a higher rate?

Best,
Ann Chambers

email.subject: Do you offer early morning appointments?
email.body:
Hi,

I need to have work done before I leave for the office at 8am.

Do you offer early morning appointments starting at 7am or earlier?

Thanks,
Dan Cook

email.subject: What is the latest time you accept call-outs?
email.body:
Hello,

I often have plumbing issues that are only noticed in the evening.

What is the latest time of day you will accept a call-out booking?

Kind regards,
Lisa Doyle

email.subject: Are you open on Sundays?
email.body:
Hi,

I wanted to know if you carry out plumbing work on Sundays at all.

If so, are Sunday rates the same as weekdays?

Thanks,
Paul Ryan

email.subject: Do you work on Christmas Day or New Year?
email.body:
Hello,

I know it is unusual but we had a plumbing emergency over Christmas last year.

Do you provide cover on Christmas Day or New Year's Day?

Best regards,
Emma Sage

email.subject: What time does your last appointment start?
email.body:
Hi,

I need a late afternoon appointment and wanted to know when your last slot of the day is.

Could you let me know your booking cut-off time?

Thank you,
Tom Birch

email.subject: Is there a late evening service available?
email.body:
Hello,

My partner and I both work until 6pm and struggle to get home for daytime appointments.

Do you have any evening slots available after 6pm?

Best,
Nina Stone

email.subject: Need someone to unblock a heavily blocked toilet
email.body:
Hi,

Our upstairs toilet is completely blocked and won't flush at all.

We need a plumber to come and clear the blockage as soon as possible.

Thank you,
Frank Porter

email.subject: Radiator in living room not heating up
email.body:
Hello,

The radiator in our living room is cold even when the heating is on.

All other radiators are working fine. Could you send someone to investigate?

Best regards,
Rita Warren

email.subject: Leaking pipe behind the washing machine needs fixing
email.body:
Hi,

There is a slow leak coming from the pipe connection behind our washing machine.

We need a plumber to fix this before it causes damage to the floor.

Thank you,
Steve Hunt

email.subject: Dripping tap in the bathroom needs repair
email.body:
Hello,

The hot tap in our bathroom has been dripping constantly for several days.

Could you send a plumber to repair or replace the tap washer?

Kind regards,
Jenny Walsh

email.subject: Hot water tank leaking from the side
email.body:
Hi,

Our hot water storage tank has started leaking from a joint on the side.

We need someone to come and fix the leak before it gets worse.

Thank you,
Keith Hardy

email.subject: Kitchen waste pipe has come apart and needs reconnecting
email.body:
Hello,

The waste pipe under the kitchen sink has come loose and water drains straight onto the cabinet floor.

Could you send someone to reconnect and seal it properly?

Best,
Brenda Lane

email.subject: Boiler making loud banging noises - needs inspection
email.body:
Hi,

Our boiler has been making loud banging and clanking noises when it fires up.

Could you send a technician to diagnose and fix the problem?

Thanks,
Andrew Kent

email.subject: Outside drain is blocked with debris - need clearing
email.body:
Hello,

The drain in our back garden is completely blocked with leaves and mud.

Water is backing up and flooding the patio. We need it cleared urgently.

Thank you,
Carol Norris

email.subject: Complaint - technician arrived over two hours late
email.body:
Hello,

Your technician was supposed to arrive between 10am and 12pm but did not arrive until 2:30pm.

I had to take time off work and received no prior warning about the delay. This is completely unacceptable.

I would like a formal response.

Barry Scott

email.subject: Leak came back the very next day after repair
email.body:
Hi,

Your plumber repaired a leak yesterday, but it has already restarted overnight.

I am very unhappy that the problem was not properly fixed.

Please send someone back immediately.

Sharon Gibbs

email.subject: Plumber left a huge mess after the visit
email.body:
Hello,

After the repair, your technician left the bathroom in a terrible state.

There was debris and dirty water left on the floor and tiles.

I am very disappointed with the lack of care shown.

Terry Price

email.subject: Charged more than the agreed quote
email.body:
Hi,

The final invoice was significantly higher than the quote I was given before work started.

No one told me the price had changed. I am unhappy and would like an explanation.

Janet Burns

email.subject: Plumber said it wasn't their problem and left
email.body:
Hello,

Your technician came out but said the issue was not within scope and left without doing anything.

I have been charged a call-out fee for nothing. I am very frustrated and unhappy with this outcome.

Chris Doyle

email.subject: Appointment was cancelled without any notice
email.body:
Hi,

I took a day off work for today's appointment and received no confirmation or cancellation message.

I wasted an entire day waiting at home. This is a very poor level of service.

Anne Hughes

email.subject: Still waiting for a callback promised over a week ago
email.body:
Hello,

I was told a manager would call me back within 48 hours to discuss a complaint.

It has now been over a week and I have heard nothing. This is extremely poor customer service.

Gary Watts

email.subject: Work was done so badly we had to call another company
email.body:
Hi,

The repair carried out by your team was of such poor quality that we had to hire a different plumber to redo it.

We are very dissatisfied and would like to raise a formal complaint.

Helen Cross

email.subject: Fantastic service today - really impressed
email.body:
Hello,

Just a quick note to say your plumber today was absolutely fantastic.

He was polite, knowledgeable, and fixed the problem in no time. We are really impressed.

Will definitely use you again!

Sophie Dean

email.subject: Very happy with how quickly you came out
email.body:
Hi,

I wanted to say how pleased I was with your rapid response to my emergency call yesterday.

Your technician arrived within the hour and sorted everything out efficiently.

Very satisfied,
Ed Marsh

email.subject: Outstanding service - will definitely recommend you
email.body:
Hello,

I am writing to say how outstanding the service was during our recent bathroom plumbing work.

Everything was done neatly and on time. I have already recommended you to two neighbours.

Best regards,
Alice Cole

email.subject: Engineer went above and beyond - thank you
email.body:
Hi,

I just wanted to pass on how impressed I was with your engineer this morning.

He noticed an additional small leak we had not reported and fixed it at no extra charge. Truly excellent service.

Many thanks,
Oliver Cross

email.subject: So happy with how clean and tidy the work was
email.body:
Hello,

I was pleasantly surprised by how little mess was left after the installation work.

The team was very professional and tidied up thoroughly before leaving. Very happy indeed.

Margaret Flynn

email.subject: Brilliant work on the boiler service
email.body:
Hi,

The annual boiler service carried out last week was superb.

The engineer was thorough, explained everything clearly, and was very polite throughout.

Will certainly be booking again next year.

Peter Dale

email.subject: Super professional team - no mess left behind
email.body:
Hello,

I just wanted to say how professional your team was during the pipe repair yesterday.

They were extremely tidy and respectful of our home. We are very happy with the result.

Kind regards,
Kate Vincent

email.subject: Couldn't be happier with the repair service
email.body:
Hi,

Your plumber did a wonderful job fixing the leak under our kitchen sink.

He was quick, friendly, and explained exactly what had gone wrong and how he fixed it. Very happy customer!

James Barry

email.subject: Shower you fitted last month is already leaking
email.body:
Hello,

The shower unit your team installed last month has started dripping from the hose connection.

As this should still be under warranty, I would like this repaired at no charge.

Liam Cross

email.subject: Tap repair from two weeks ago has already failed
email.body:
Hi,

The kitchen tap was repaired two weeks ago by your technician, but it has started dripping again.

This should be covered under your work guarantee. Please advise.

Naomi Hart

email.subject: New boiler is already losing pressure again
email.body:
Hello,

You installed our new boiler six weeks ago and it has already started losing pressure regularly.

I believe this is a fault and should be covered under the installation warranty.

Ben Porter

email.subject: Repaired pipe joint is dripping again
email.body:
Hi,

The pipe joint your plumber sealed last month under a guarantee has started leaking again.

Could you send someone to re-inspect and repair under the warranty?

Sarah Byrne

email.subject: Sealant you applied has come away after three weeks
email.body:
Hello,

The silicone sealant applied around our bath three weeks ago has already started peeling away.

I would like this rectified under warranty as it should last far longer.

Tom Gill

email.subject: Radiator valve replaced last month is stuck again
email.body:
Hi,

The thermostatic radiator valve you replaced last month is already seized and the radiator won't turn off.

Please send someone to fix this under the work guarantee.

Carol Ward

email.subject: New toilet flush you fitted is not working properly
email.body:
Hello,

The toilet flush mechanism you replaced recently is already unreliable and often fails to flush fully.

I believe this should be covered under warranty. Please arrange a return visit.

Ian Gray

email.subject: Sink installed six weeks ago is already wobbling
email.body:
Hi,

The bathroom sink your team installed around six weeks ago has started to wobble when pressure is applied.

I would like this inspected and corrected as it should still be within the guarantee period.

June Hall

email.subject: The tap you installed is faulty - need a replacement
email.body:
Hello,

The tap fitted by your team is already showing signs of a manufacturing defect.

Rather than repair it again, I would like a full replacement with a different unit.

Adam Cole

email.subject: Boiler part you replaced has broken again - want a replacement
email.body:
Hi,

The part replaced in our boiler last month has failed a second time.

I would like to request a replacement of the entire component rather than another repair.

Lisa Newman

email.subject: Shower head you fitted is cracked - please replace it
email.body:
Hello,

The shower head installed by your engineer has developed a crack and is leaking.

Could you arrange a replacement of the shower head please?

Rob Gordon

email.subject: Valve keeps failing repeatedly - I want a different brand
email.body:
Hi,

The valve you have repaired twice now keeps breaking down.

I would like it replaced with a different make or model that is more reliable.

Claire Hunt

email.subject: Stop repairing the same part - just replace the whole unit
email.body:
Hello,

We have had the same pump repaired three times in the past year.

At this point I would like the entire unit replaced rather than patched up again.

Derek James

email.subject: The pipe fitting has failed twice - replace the whole section
email.body:
Hi,

The same pipe fitting has now failed twice despite being repaired each time.

I would like a complete replacement of that section of pipework to resolve this once and for all.

Mary Walsh

email.subject: Filter you installed is already clogged - needs replacing
email.body:
Hello,

The water filter installed just a few weeks ago has already clogged up completely.

Could you replace it with a higher capacity unit that won't need replacing so soon?

Alex Young

email.subject: Pump you replaced doesn't work either - need a new one
email.body:
Hi,

The replacement pump fitted last week has already stopped working.

I would like a completely different pump model to be installed as a replacement.

Rachel Dunn

email.subject: I want my money back - the problem was never resolved
email.body:
Hello,

I paid for a pipe repair two weeks ago but the leak has not been fixed.

I would like a full refund as the service I paid for was not delivered.

Paul Newman

email.subject: Your plumber didn't turn up - please refund my deposit
email.body:
Hi,

Your technician never arrived for the appointment and I was not contacted.

I paid a deposit upfront and I would like it refunded in full.

Helen Grant

email.subject: You charged me twice on the invoice - please refund the difference
email.body:
Hello,

I have reviewed my invoice and noticed the call-out fee was applied twice.

Could you please refund the duplicate charge?

Mike Baker

email.subject: Wrong part was ordered - please refund the cost
email.body:
Hi,

The part your team ordered for the repair was incorrect and could not be fitted.

I was charged for the part and would like a refund since it was not used.

Sue Rice

email.subject: Cancelling the service - want my deposit back
email.body:
Hello,

I have decided to cancel the planned work and would like my deposit returned.

Nothing has been started yet so I expect a full refund.

David Carr

email.subject: Work not completed as agreed - requesting full refund
email.body:
Hi,

The work scope agreed in the quote was only partially completed but I was charged in full.

I would like a refund for the portion of the work that was not done.

Emily Ross

email.subject: Your team damaged my floor - I want compensation
email.body:
Hello,

During the repair, your technician cracked several tiles on our kitchen floor.

I paid for the repair in full but have now also been left with damage costs. I would like compensation.

Tony Shaw

email.subject: Paid upfront but very unsatisfied - requesting refund
email.body:
Hi,

I paid for the job in full before it started, but the result was completely unsatisfactory.

The problem remains and I would like a refund for the service.

Fiona Black

email.subject: Can I upgrade from basic to premium maintenance cover?
email.body:
Hello,

I currently have your basic annual maintenance plan and would like to know if I can upgrade to a premium package.

What does the premium plan include that the basic one does not?

Colin Ward

email.subject: What are the options for upgrading our old heating system?
email.body:
Hi,

Our current heating system is quite old and we are interested in upgrading to a more modern and efficient option.

Could you advise on what upgrades are available?

Wendy Marsh

email.subject: Is there a priority response tier available?
email.body:
Hello,

I am interested in a service level that guarantees faster response times for any issues.

Do you offer a priority or VIP service tier I could upgrade to?

Phil Watts

email.subject: Can I add annual boiler service to my existing plan?
email.body:
Hi,

I have your standard plumbing cover but would like to add an annual boiler service to the package.

Is this possible and what would it cost to upgrade?

Linda Foster

email.subject: Interested in upgrading to a whole-home water softener
email.body:
Hello,

We currently have a unit under the kitchen sink but would like to upgrade to a whole-home water softening system.

Could you explain the options and costs?

Harry Brooks

email.subject: Looking to upgrade pipes throughout the house
email.body:
Hi,

Our house still has original copper pipes and we are considering upgrading to modern push-fit plastic.

What are the options and benefits of doing this?

Jan Burns

email.subject: What is the difference between your standard and premium plans?
email.body:
Hello,

I am considering upgrading my current service agreement but would like to understand the differences.

Could you send me a comparison of the standard and premium service plans?

Tom Stone

email.subject: Can I add emergency cover to my service agreement?
email.body:
Hi,

I would like to add emergency call-out cover to my existing maintenance agreement.

Is this something I can upgrade to, and what would the additional cost be?

Vicky Lane

email.subject: Plumbing contractor needed for 50-property portfolio
email.body:
Hello,

We manage a portfolio of 50 residential properties and are looking for a reliable plumbing contractor.

Could you provide information on bulk pricing and service agreements?

Regards,
Property Management Team

email.subject: Corporate plumbing inquiry for factory maintenance
email.body:
Hi,

We run a mid-sized factory and need a plumbing company to handle regular maintenance and emergency call-outs.

Could you discuss a corporate account arrangement?

Thank you,
Facilities Manager

email.subject: Seeking bulk quote for housing association with 100 units
email.body:
Hello,

We are a housing association managing 100 units across three sites.

We are looking for a plumbing company to provide a bulk service contract for ongoing maintenance and emergency response.

Best regards,
Operations Director

email.subject: Looking for plumbing partner for property management firm
email.body:
Hi,

Our property management company is looking for a plumbing partner across our managed portfolio.

Could you provide details on how you work with property managers and what commercial pricing looks like?

Thanks,
NPM Properties

email.subject: Need a company for all plumbing in 12 rental properties
email.body:
Hello,

I own 12 rental properties and need a single plumbing company to handle all maintenance.

Do you offer a landlord service agreement with discounted rates for multiple properties?

Best,
Ridge View Rentals

email.subject: Long-term service agreement for commercial estate
email.body:
Hi,

We manage a commercial estate of office units and retail spaces.

We are interested in a long-term plumbing service agreement to cover all maintenance and emergency calls.

Thank you,
Operations Team

email.subject: Student accommodation - need regular plumbing cover
email.body:
Hello,

I am caretaker for a student accommodation block with 80 rooms.

We need a plumbing company on retainer for routine maintenance and emergency repairs throughout the academic year.

Best regards,
Accommodation Manager

email.subject: Maintenance manager seeking bulk plumbing provider
email.body:
Hi,

As maintenance manager for a group of mixed-use buildings, I am looking for a bulk plumbing provider.

Could we arrange a meeting to discuss terms and coverage?

Thank you,
Maintenance Manager

email.subject: Just forwarding this email as requested
email.body:
Hi,

Please find forwarded below the email thread you asked me to send over.

Let me know if you need anything else.

Mike Carter

email.subject: Confirming receipt of your quote
email.body:
Hello,

This is just to confirm I have received the quote you sent over.

I will review it and get back to you shortly.

Thank you,
Diane Wood

email.subject: Passing along my colleague's contact details
email.body:
Hi,

As discussed on the phone, here are my colleague's contact details.

Please feel free to get in touch with them directly.

Bob Hill

email.subject: Just acknowledging your update
email.body:
Hello,

Thank you for the update. I just wanted to confirm that I received your message.

No action is needed from my end at this time.

Anna Rice

email.subject: Forwarding the document you requested
email.body:
Hi,

Please find attached the document you asked for last week.

Let me know if there is anything else you need.

John Cross

email.subject: Just checking my email reaches the right address
email.body:
Hello,

I just wanted to send a quick test to confirm this email address is correct.

No response needed.

Claire Rowe

email.subject: No action needed - just staying in touch
email.body:
Hi,

This is just a brief note to say I have not forgotten about our conversation.

I will be in touch properly once I have made a decision.

Sam Pike

email.subject: Received your letter - thank you
email.body:
Hello,

I just wanted to let you know I received the letter you sent.

Everything looks fine and I appreciate you following up.

Lucy Moon

email.subject: Question about accepted payment methods
email.body:
Hi,

I was wondering what payment methods you accept for plumbing work.

Do you take credit cards, bank transfer, or is it cash only?

Thank you,
Alice Mason

email.subject: Can I pay in instalments for a large job?
email.body:
Hello,

I have a large repiping job to do and the cost is quite significant.

Do you offer any instalment payment options so I can spread the cost?

Best regards,
Tom Hunt

email.subject: Invoice query - not sure what I was charged for
email.body:
Hi,

I received an invoice but some of the line items are not very clear to me.

Could someone explain what each charge covers?

Thank you,
Helen Davies

email.subject: Is a deposit required before work begins?
email.body:
Hello,

Before I confirm the booking, I wanted to check whether a deposit is required upfront.

If so, how much and how do I pay it?

Best,
Neil Ross

email.subject: Do you send digital invoices or paper only?
email.body:
Hi,

I prefer to receive invoices electronically for my records.

Do you issue digital invoices by email?

Thanks,
Karen Black

email.subject: How long do I have to pay after the work is done?
email.body:
Hello,

I was wondering what your payment terms are after job completion.

How many days do I have before payment is due?

Kind regards,
James Leigh

email.subject: Was I charged a call-out fee on top of the repair?
email.body:
Hi,

I noticed the total on my invoice was higher than expected.

Was a separate call-out fee charged in addition to the repair cost?

Thank you,
Anna Ford

email.subject: Can I pay by bank transfer for the upcoming job?
email.body:
Hello,

I would prefer to settle the invoice via bank transfer rather than card.

Could you send me your bank details so I can arrange payment?

Regards,
David Murray
